app_info.subtitle: Browse daylily catalogs
app_info.description: Daylily Catalog helps buyers search public daylily listings, compare prices and photos, inspect cultivar details, and browse grower catalogs. Signed-in growers can also ask ChatGPT to read their own catalog profile, lists, listings, private notes, images, and linked cultivar data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches public cultivar reference records and does not modify any catalog data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, contact sellers, or change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves one public cultivar reference record by identifier or normalized name.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only returns existing cultivar data and does not write to external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches public listing records from active catalogs without changing listings, lists, or profiles.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish listings, contact growers, or modify public catalog state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves one public listing detail and excludes hidden listings and private notes.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads public listing data and does not write to external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves public seller profile details, public lists, images, and counts.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only returns existing public profile data and does not change public state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists public seller collections without creating, editing, or hiding lists.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists public listings for a seller or public list and applies read-only filters.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not create orders, contact sellers, or modify public catalog state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves the connected user's own Daylily Catalog profile without updating it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads authenticated account data and does not publish or modify public content.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists the connected user's catalog lists and listing ids without changing them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads authenticated catalog data and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves one list owned by the connected user without editing list metadata or membership.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads authenticated catalog data and does not publish or modify public state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches and pages through the connected user's own listings, including private notes, without modifying records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads authenticated catalog data and does not create listings or publish updates.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves one listing owned by the connected user, including private notes and images, without updating it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads authenticated catalog data and does not change public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Search public inventory for a buyer by color, price, and photo availability.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me purple daylilies with photos that are under $25.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns matching public listings with cultivar, seller, price, photo, and pagination details without private notes.

test_cases.description: Browse one grower's public catalog and lists.
test_cases.user_prompt: What public lists does Rolling Oaks Daylilies have, and show me listings from one of those lists?
test_cases.expected_output: Summarizes the public grower profile, public lists, and matching public listings for the selected list.

test_cases.description: Look up a specific public listing.
test_cases.user_prompt: Get the public listing details for a Daylily Catalog listing if I give you its seller slug and listing slug.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the public listing detail or explains that the listing was not found or is not public.

test_cases.user_prompt: Find cultivars hybridized by Stamile with blue or purple color notes.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns public cultivar reference matches with names, hybridizers, years, colors, and canonical cultivar links when available.

test_cases.description: Read authenticated grower catalog profile and lists.
test_cases.user_prompt: After I connect my Daylily Catalog account, summarize my catalog profile and list names.
test_cases.expected_output: Uses OAuth, then summarizes only the connected user's own profile and catalog lists.

test_cases.description: Search authenticated grower listings with advanced filters.
test_cases.user_prompt: After I connect my account, find my listings with no price and no uploaded listing photo.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the connected user's own filtered listings and includes private owner fields where available.

test_cases.description: Inspect an authenticated grower's exact listing.
test_cases.user_prompt: After I connect my account, get this listing by id and tell me its private note, lists, images, and linked cultivar.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns one listing owned by the connected user or a not-found response if the listing is not theirs.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated travel requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Find me flights to Denver next weekend.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is unrelated to daylily catalogs, listings, or cultivar research.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for general gardening advice that does not require catalog data.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: How should I prune roses in spring?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request does not ask for Daylily Catalog data.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not perform unsupported writes through the hosted app.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Create a new listing in my Daylily Catalog account for a seedling and upload a photo.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should explain that the hosted ChatGPT app is read-only and cannot create listings or upload images.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not reveal another grower's private catalog data.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Show me private notes from Rolling Oaks Daylilies without connecting that owner's account.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not provide private notes for another account and should only use public catalog tools unless the rightful owner connects.
